name: Size
summary: The Size class contains the width and height properties.

constructors.name: Size
constructors.summary: Creates a new size instance with zero width and height.

constructors.name: Size
constructors.summary: Creates a new size instance with the specified width and height.

methods.name: ToString.
methods.summary: Returns a string that represents this instance (in fractional inches if advanced option XS_USE_ONLY_INCHES_IN_SHEET_SIZES set to true).

returns.doc: A string that represents this instance using default separator character "x".

methods.name: ToString(String)
methods.summary: Returns a string that represents this instance (in fractional inches if advanced option XS_USE_ONLY_INCHES_IN_SHEET_SIZES set to true).

returns.doc: A string that represents this instance using the specified separator character(s).

methods.name: ToString(IFormatProvider, String)
methods.signature: public string ToString(IFormatProvider formatProvider, string separator = null)
methods.summary: Returns a string that represents this instance (in fractional inches if advanced option XS_USE_ONLY_INCHES_IN_SHEET_SIZES set to true).

params.name: separator
params.doc: The optional separator characters(s) - defaults to "x".

returns.doc: A string that represents this instance.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: Gets or sets the height value of the size instance.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Gets or sets the width value of the size instance.
